message:
interactive: formatting cleanup + quit_cmd method reference

Minor code formatting and method reference fix:

Formatting changes:
- Break long arithmetic expression in reserved width calculation
- Reformat footer_short string construction
- Standard rustfmt-compliant line breaks

Method reference fix:
- Change quit() to self.quit_cmd() in Ctrl+C double-tap handler
- Ensures consistent quit behavior with proper cleanup
